author: Youcef Mammar
subject: feat(insights): add insights support to InfiniteHits widget (algolia/vue-instantsearch#666)
body:
* feat(insights): add insights support to InfiniteHits widget **Summary** This integrates insights with Vue Instantsearch to help using Click Analytics in InfiniteHits. Using `connectInfiniteHitsWithInsights` instead of `connectInfiniteHits` exposed a new property `insights` to the internal state, which user can call to emit insights events. **Result** ```html
``` * fix: increase bundle size 66kB -> 67kB * fix: declare variable inside scope * fix: expose insights in item slot
